title: Faithful 32x - Transparent GUI
body:
# Summary
Made for [Faithful 32x Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)\
[License for faithful teams assets use](https://faithfulpack.net/license)\
Makes all GUI transparent and have a more simplistic art style in a higher resolution\
Inspired by the work of lavadragon15396 that is no longer available\
Feel free to give feedback
# Support
- [Entity Texture Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric)
- [Hide Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hide-armor)
- [Shulkerbox Tooltips](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Voice Chat Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
- [GUIdes](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/guides-32x/)
